[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011010 5
1 10111001 5
2 00001000 1
3 00000000 a
4 00001101 3
5 00110000 2
6 11011010 5
7 10111001 5
